---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsignif)

data_table <- readRDS("/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/TCGA/scores/TCGA_working_tables.rds")
```

```{r}
# Prepare data frame 
COAD.MSI_is_df <- data_table$COAD.MSI_IS
COAD.MSI_armcnv_df <- data_table$COAD.MSI_ArmCNV
common_patients <- intersect(rownames(COAD.MSI_is_df), rownames(COAD.MSI_armcnv_df))
COAD.MSI_is_df <- COAD.MSI_is_df[common_patients, , drop = FALSE]
COAD.MSI_armcnv_df <- COAD.MSI_armcnv_df[common_patients, , drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
# Arms to plot
arms_to_plot <- c("Arm3p", "Arm9p", "Arm12p")

for (arm in arms_to_plot) {

  if (!(arm %in% colnames(COAD.MSI_armcnv_df))) {
    message(paste("Skipping", arm, "- not found in COAD.MSI_ArmCNV"))
    next
  }

  # Assign CNV status
  cnv_status <- case_when(
    COAD.MSI_armcnv_df[[arm]] > 0.2  ~ "Gain",
    COAD.MSI_armcnv_df[[arm]] < -0.2 ~ "Loss",
    TRUE                             ~ "Neutral"
  )

  # Prepare plot data
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    IS = COAD.MSI_is_df$Ranked_Sum,
    CNV_Status = factor(cnv_status, levels = c("Loss", "Neutral", "Gain"))
  )

  # Define comparisons
  comparisons <- list(
    c("Loss", "Neutral"),
    c("Neutral", "Gain")
  )

  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = CNV_Status, y = IS, fill = CNV_Status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
    geom_signif(
      comparisons = comparisons,
      test = "wilcox.test",
      map_signif_level = TRUE,
      step_increase = 0.1,
      textsize = 5
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Loss" = "#4F6DB8", "Neutral" = "#B8B8B8", "Gain" = "#EA6A6A")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Immune Score"
    )

  # Show the plot before saving
  print(p)

  # Save plots
  #file_base <- paste0("COAD.MSI_", arm, "_IS_RankedSum")
  #ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  #ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, device = "pdf")
}
```

# KIRC 
```{r}
############ KIRC #########
# Prepare data frame 
KIRC_is_df <- data_table$KIRC_IS
KIRC_armcnv_df <- data_table$KIRC_ArmCNV
common_patients <- intersect(rownames(KIRC_is_df), rownames(KIRC_armcnv_df))
KIRC_is_df <- KIRC_is_df[common_patients, , drop = FALSE]
KIRC_armcnv_df <- KIRC_armcnv_df[common_patients, , drop = FALSE]
colnames(KIRC_armcnv_df)
```


```{r}
# Arms to plot
arms_to_plot <- c("Arm3p", "Arm14q")

for (arm in arms_to_plot) {

  if (!(arm %in% colnames(KIRC_armcnv_df))) {
    message(paste("Skipping", arm, "- not found in KIRC_ArmCNV"))
    next
  }

  # Assign CNV status
  cnv_status <- case_when(
    KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] > 0.2  ~ "Gain",
    KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] < -0.2 ~ "Loss",
    TRUE                         ~ "Neutral"
  )

  # Prepare plot data
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    IS = KIRC_is_df$Ranked_Sum,
    CNV_Status = factor(cnv_status, levels = c("Loss", "Neutral", "Gain"))
  )

  # Define comparisons
  comparisons <- list(
    c("Loss", "Neutral"),
    c("Neutral", "Gain")
  )

  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = CNV_Status, y = IS, fill = CNV_Status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
    geom_signif(
      comparisons = comparisons,
      test = "wilcox.test",
      map_signif_level = TRUE,
      step_increase = 0.1,
      textsize = 5
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Loss" = "#4F6DB8", "Neutral" = "#B8B8B8", "Gain" = "#EA6A6A")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Immune Score"
    )
  
  print(p)
  
  # Save plots
  file_base <- paste0("KIRC_", arm, "_IS_RankedSum")
  #ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, device = "pdf")
}
```

```{r}
# === KIRC Arm9p-only plot ===
arm <- "Arm9p"

if (!(arm %in% colnames(KIRC_armcnv_df))) {
  stop(paste("Error:", arm, "not found in KIRC_ArmCNV"))
}

# Assign CNV status
cnv_status <- case_when(
  KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] > 0.3  ~ "Gain",
  KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] < -0.3 ~ "Loss",
  TRUE                         ~ "Neutral"
)

# Prepare plot data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  IS = KIRC_is_df$Ranked_Sum,
  CNV_Status = factor(cnv_status, levels = c("Loss", "Neutral", "Gain"))
)

# Define comparisons
comparisons <- list(
  c("Loss", "Neutral"),
  c("Neutral", "Gain")
)

# Create the plot
p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = CNV_Status, y = IS, fill = CNV_Status)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    test = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    step_increase = 0.1,
    textsize = 5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Loss" = "#4F6DB8", "Neutral" = "#B8B8B8", "Gain" = "#EA6A6A")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Immune Score"
  ) +
  ggtitle("KIRC Arm9p")

print(p)

# Save plot
ggsave("KIRC_Arm9p_IS_RankedSum.pdf", plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, device = "pdf")
# Optional: also save PNG
# ggsave("KIRC_Arm9p_IS_RankedSum.png", plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# Pairwise Wilcoxon tests
loss_vs_neutral <- wilcox.test(
  plot_df$IS[plot_df$CNV_Status == "Loss"],
  plot_df$IS[plot_df$CNV_Status == "Neutral"]
)

neutral_vs_gain <- wilcox.test(
  plot_df$IS[plot_df$CNV_Status == "Neutral"],
  plot_df$IS[plot_df$CNV_Status == "Gain"]
)

# Print results
cat("Loss vs Neutral p-value:", loss_vs_neutral$p.value, "\n")
cat("Neutral vs Gain p-value:", neutral_vs_gain$p.value, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Arms to plot – now includes Arm9p
arms_to_plot <- c("Arm1p", "Arm1q","Arm2p", "Arm2q", "Arm9p")

for (arm in arms_to_plot) {

  if (!(arm %in% colnames(KIRC_armcnv_df))) {
    message(paste("Skipping", arm, "- not found in KIRC_ArmCNV"))
    next
  }

  # Assign CNV status
  cnv_status <- case_when(
    KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] > 0.2  ~ "Gain",
    KIRC_armcnv_df[[arm]] < -0.2 ~ "Loss",
    TRUE                         ~ "Neutral"
  )

  # Prepare plot data
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    IS = KIRC_is_df$Ranked_Sum,
    CNV_Status = factor(cnv_status, levels = c("Loss", "Neutral", "Gain"))
  )

  # Define comparisons
  comparisons <- list(
    c("Loss", "Neutral"),
    c("Neutral", "Gain")
  )

  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = CNV_Status, y = IS, fill = CNV_Status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
    geom_signif(
      comparisons = comparisons,
      test = "wilcox.test",
      map_signif_level = TRUE,
      step_increase = 0.1,
      textsize = 5
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Loss" = "#4F6DB8", "Neutral" = "#B8B8B8", "Gain" = "#EA6A6A")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Immune Score"
    ) +
    ggtitle(paste("KIRC", arm))  # optional: add title for clarity

  print(p)

  # Save plots
  #file_base <- paste0("KIRC_", arm, "_IS_RankedSum")
  # ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  #ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, device = "pdf")
}
```

```{r}
# if want to print p values on top 

```
